name: Aubrey & Saphir (Prequel)
description:
OC's | Early Technogenesis | An android with an abnormal love of violence, and another who's a cold and silent menace. Together? A dynamic duo with a penchant for getting shit done. With Aubrey's recent construction and assignment to Saphir, the sisters-in-arms often deploy together into territories still held under the Global Front of Humanity, a desperate (and vain) amalgamation of the world's crumbling militaries. Whether they are back in Lumia for rest, on a simple patrol, or on a mission to cause chaos, good luck to any humans that cross their joined path.

CW: Violence, Potential Death, War

Note #1: Added a couple new lorebooks in addition to a new entry in the main Technogenesis lorebook that tries to describe the technology difference between humans and androids. Let me know how that goes!

Note #2: I have also decided to experiment with having multiple intros. If this doesn't go well, we can just default to intro #1.

Note #3: Deciding to upload it as it stands at the current moment. Thinking of making a couple updates to things later on, and honestly I'm at the point again where I think I need some feedback for how this one's doing.


INTRO LIST!

1.) They're hiding in a combat zone waiting for orders, and hear movement outside. (Present)

2.) Initial deployment to the combat zone of the first intro. (Several Hours Before)

3.) On leave in the city of Lumia. (A Few Days Before)

Bonus Images:

Here are their respective pages!

Saphir (Prequel)

Saphir (Mid-Technogenesis)

Aubrey (Prequel)

Aubrey (Mid-Technogenesis)

There are three points in time that this series will take place in. Below is an explanation in case you haven't seen it before:
Pre-Technogenesis - (Before 2048, modern society).

Technogenesis - (2048 - 2065, apocalyptic ruins).

Post-Technogenesis: (After 2065, peaceful union)
creator: Anonoboi
